summary: Final verdict PASS for envelope auto-injection. All 8 ACs verified. DA, QA, and challenger aligned. Four non-blocking challenger concerns acknowledged and accepted: producer_type no-clobber gap (schema covers highest-risk fields), incomplete registry (4/8 types, DEBT-001 tracked), non-deterministic phase_review artifact_id, silent status override. Feature solves the core problem of reducing agent envelope errors.
rationale: The closure packet is complete and consistent. Gate passed all tiers. All reviewers approved. Challenger found no blocking issues. The implementation faithfully delivers on the contract scope: 4 commands auto-inject envelope fields before validation, evidence trust boundary preserved, enrichTimestamp ownership intact, no-clobber backward compatibility maintained. The remaining gaps (incomplete registry, producer_type validation) are correctly scoped as future work and tracked debt.
